_description: Principal Resolution — Vault Manifest. Maps all content assets to Institutional States. Single source of truth for routing, SEO, and diagnostic linkage.

institutional_states.label: Trust Deficit
institutional_states.short_description: The organization operates under a persistent leadership credibility gap that undermines decision quality and retention.

seo_meta.title: Trust Deficit — Institutional State IS-01 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Organizations in Trust Deficit show measurable credibility gaps between leadership and workforce. Learn the diagnostic indicators and resolution path.

institutional_states.label: Accountability Void
institutional_states.short_description: Role clarity and consequence structures are absent or inconsistently enforced, producing performance diffusion across teams.

seo_meta.title: Accountability Void — Institutional State IS-02 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: When accountability structures collapse, performance follows. IS-02 maps the indicators and the resolution path.

institutional_states.label: Engagement Collapse
institutional_states.short_description: Workforce engagement has fallen below functional threshold, producing measurable output and quality degradation.

seo_meta.title: Engagement Collapse — Institutional State IS-03 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Engagement Collapse is a structural failure, not a culture failure. IS-03 defines the signals and the resolution sequence.

institutional_states.label: Attrition Acceleration
institutional_states.short_description: Voluntary exits are outpacing replacement capacity, creating institutional knowledge loss at compounding velocity.

seo_meta.title: Attrition Acceleration — Institutional State IS-04 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: When exits compound faster than onboarding can absorb, the organization enters Attrition Acceleration. IS-04 maps the cost and the intervention.

institutional_states.label: Structural Ambiguity
institutional_states.short_description: Reporting lines, decision rights, and role boundaries are undefined or contested, producing friction at every execution layer.

seo_meta.title: Structural Ambiguity — Institutional State IS-05 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Unclear structure isn't a growing pain. It's a compounding tax on every decision. IS-05 defines the pattern and the path forward.

institutional_states.label: Burnout Infrastructure
institutional_states.short_description: The operational design of the organization systematically produces employee burnout, independent of individual coping capacity.

seo_meta.title: Burnout Infrastructure — Institutional State IS-06 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Burnout Infrastructure means the system itself is the problem. IS-06 identifies the structural causes and intervention points.

institutional_states.label: Management Failure
institutional_states.short_description: Frontline and mid-level management is producing measurable team dysfunction through under-development, misalignment, or poor selection.

seo_meta.title: Management Failure — Institutional State IS-07 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Seventy percent of engagement variance lives in the manager. IS-07 defines when management has failed systemically and what resolution requires.

institutional_states.label: Culture Toxicity
institutional_states.short_description: Behavioral norms within the organization actively undermine psychological safety, fairness, or inclusion in ways that produce measurable exit rates.

seo_meta.title: Culture Toxicity — Institutional State IS-08 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Culture Toxicity is the leading predictor of attrition — 10.4x more powerful than compensation. IS-08 maps it, measures it, and resolves it.

institutional_states.label: Silence Dynamic
institutional_states.short_description: The organization has developed patterns of suppressed dissent and withheld feedback that degrade decision quality at every level.

seo_meta.title: Silence Dynamic — Institutional State IS-09 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: When people stop speaking, organizations stop learning. IS-09 identifies the Silence Dynamic and the structural interventions that break it.

institutional_states.label: Mission Diffusion
institutional_states.short_description: Strategic intent has failed to propagate through the organization, producing misaligned execution and discretionary effort collapse.

seo_meta.title: Mission Diffusion — Institutional State IS-10 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: When only 40% of your people can describe what the organization stands for, you have a Mission Diffusion problem. IS-10 names it and resolves it.

institutional_states.label: Leadership Isolation
institutional_states.short_description: Senior leadership has lost ground-level signal fidelity, producing strategy-execution gaps that compound with organizational size.

seo_meta.title: Leadership Isolation — Institutional State IS-11 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: Leadership Isolation isn't arrogance. It's an information architecture failure. IS-11 defines the pattern and the reconnection sequence.

institutional_states.label: Identity Fracture
institutional_states.short_description: The organization's stated values and operational behaviors have diverged to a degree that produces cynicism, disengagement, and reputational risk.

seo_meta.title: Identity Fracture — Institutional State IS-12 | Principal Resolution
seo_meta.description: When what you say and what you do no longer match, the organization is in Identity Fracture. IS-12 defines the gap and the repair.

_manifest_notes.intelligence_memo_ids: These arrays are empty at Phase I launch. Memos are added via the editorial pipeline and linked here on publish.

service_tier_guide.Tier-1: Full diagnostic engagement — high severity, multi-system dysfunction
service_tier_guide.Tier-2: Targeted advisory — contained dysfunction with clear intervention point
service_tier_guide.Tier-3: Diagnostic review + roadmap — early-stage or single-domain friction
